titleStmt.title: SII 24.155: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswamy
No. 155. (A.R. No. 363 of 1953-54.) KOṬṬĀRAM; WALL INSIDE THE GRANARY FOR STORING RICE.

summary.p: Records the gift of a thousand two-hundred and two kuḻi of land in the brahmadēya village Pūdanūr by its owner Iḷai-Āḻvāṉ-Bhaṭṭaṉ, son of [Mattaṅgi] Vāsudēva-Bhaṭṭar of Tribhuvanavīrach-chaturvēdimaṅgalam to the shrine of Sēnāpati Āḻvār for a lamp. The record is dated in the 22nd year of reign of the king and the details of the date viz., Ṛishabha, ba. 5, Wednesday, Uttirāḍam correspond regularly to A.D. 1238, May 5, Wednesday, on which day both the tithi and the nakshatra were current throughout the day.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrīḥ tiripuvaṉaccakravattikaḷ śrīrājarājatevaṟku yāṇṭu 2 10 2 Āvatu ṛṣabha nāyaṟṟu Aparapakṣa
ttu pañcamiyum putaṉkiḻamaiyum peṟṟa Uttirāṭattu nāḷ Aḻakiyamaṇavāḷap perumāḷ koyil śrīce
ṉāpati Āḻvār śrīvaiṣṇava kaṇkāṇi ceyvārkaḷukku mutal karaṇattāṟkum Uyyak koṇṭār vaḷanā
ṭṭu puram nāṭṭu Akaram śrītiripuvaṉaviraccaruppetimaṅkalattu mattaṅki śrīvāsudeva bhaṭṭar makaṉ Iḷaiā
ḻvāṉ bhaṭṭaṉeṉ dharmmadānaṅ kuṭutta paricāvatu Ivvūr piṭākai māṇikkavaḷa brahma
deyam pūtanūril Eṉṉutāy nāṉanupavittu varukira nilattukku �ṟkellai
viraipperumāḷ maṅkalat tellaikku meṟkum tenpāṟkellai pūtaṅkuṭi Ellaikku vaṭakkum me
lpāṟkellai Oṭampoku niroṭukālukkuk kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkellai neṭṭiṭaikkāl Ellaikku teṟkum I
nāṉku Ellaikku naṭuvupaṭṭa nilaṅkuḻi Āyirattorunūṟṟu Eḻupattaiñcum tiri puvaṉavīraccaruppetimaṅkalattu meṟkkaṭṭu
nālān teruvil vaṭatuṇṭaṅ kiḻciṟakil terāṭṭaiñ kol nikki Itanvaṭakku maṇai kol muṉṟiṉāl kuḻi Irupatte
ḻum Ākak kuḻi Āyirattirunūṟṟiraṇṭum periyaperumāḷ tirumuṉpu kaiviḷakkukku
tirunāmattukkāṇiyāka viṭṭeṉ §
Digital edition of SII 24.155 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
